#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on AX45MPV FPGA board via GDB
# Captures cycle counts from PF_COUNTER output.
#
# Usage:
#   run_fpga_test.sh <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   run_fpga_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias --config /path/to/config.toml
#   run_fpga_test.sh relu_s8 --timeout 600
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="${LIBNN_ROOT:-/home/nick/work/agentic_libnn_opt}"

# Defaults
TIMEOUT=300
TEST_NAME=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --config)  CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config if provided, else use hardcoded defaults
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
FPGA_HOST="sw-boards.andestech.com"
FPGA_PORT="1115"

if [ -n "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
    TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN:-${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}}"
    FPGA_HOST="${CFG_FPGA_HOST:-${FPGA_HOST}}"
    FPGA_PORT="${CFG_FPGA_PORT:-${FPGA_PORT}}"
    TIMEOUT="${CFG_FPGA_TIMEOUT:-${TIMEOUT}}"
fi

# Paths
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
BOARD_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv"
WRAPPER="${BOARD_DIR}/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board"

# FPGA board connection (env vars override config, config overrides defaults)
export MYPC="${MYPC:-${FPGA_HOST}}"
export MYPORT="${MYPORT:-${FPGA_PORT}}"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${TEST_SRC}" "${WRAPPER}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

# Create gdb-nopython symlink if needed (GDB expect script requires it)
GDB_REAL="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb"
GDB_NOPYTHON="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
GDB_EXTRA_PATH=""
if [ -f "${GDB_REAL}" ] && [ ! -e "${GDB_NOPYTHON}" ]; then
    GDB_TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/fpga_gdb_XXXXXX)
    ln -sf "${GDB_REAL}" "${GDB_TMPDIR}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
    GDB_EXTRA_PATH="${GDB_TMPDIR}:"
fi

export PATH="${GDB_EXTRA_PATH}${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${LIB_ROOT}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile with performance counters
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.adx"
OBJDUMP_FILE="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.objdump"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME} (with PF_COUNTER)"
${CC} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections \
    -DPF_COUNTER -mvh -DENA_FS_VS -DENA_FAST_ALGO \
    -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 \
    -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mzfh \
    -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS \
    -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=1 \
    -DGETENV_TESTDIR="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}" \
    -I"${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/../riscv64-elf/include" \
    -I"${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include" \
    -I"${LIB_ROOT}/Include" \
    -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Generate objdump for analysis
riscv64-elf-objdump -d "${ADX}" > "${OBJDUMP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

# Reset board state
rm -f "${BOARD_DIR}/First_Reset_done"

# Run on FPGA via GDB expect script
echo "[run] FPGA board ${MYPC}:${MYPORT} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
LOG="${WORK_DIR}/fpga_${TEST_NAME}.log"

timeout "${TIMEOUT}" "${WRAPPER}" "${ADX}" 2>&1 | tee "${LOG}"
FPGA_RC=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

echo ""

if [ "${FPGA_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
    exit 1
fi

# Parse cycle counts
CYCLE_COUNT=$(grep -o "The cycle count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")
INST_COUNT=$(grep -o "The inst count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")

# Parse accuracy
if grep -qi "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}"; then
    PASS_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}" || true)
    FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" "${LOG}" || true)

    echo "--- FPGA Results ---"
    echo "  Cycles: ${CYCLE_COUNT:-unknown}"
    echo "  Instructions: ${INST_COUNT:-unknown}"
    if [ -n "${CYCLE_COUNT}" ] && [ -n "${INST_COUNT}" ]; then
        IPC=$(python3 -c "print(f'{${INST_COUNT}/${CYCLE_COUNT}:.2f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
        echo "  IPC: ${IPC}"
    fi
    echo "  Accuracy: ${PASS_COUNT} pass, ${FAIL_COUNT} fail"
    echo "  ADX: ${ADX}"
    echo "  Objdump: ${OBJDUMP_FILE}"
    echo "---"

    if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: FAIL"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: PASS (cycles=${CYCLE_COUNT})"
        exit 0
    fi
else
    echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected)"
    exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Incrementally rebuild a single source file and update libnn.a
# ~100x faster than full build.sh (1 file vs ~400 files)
#
# Usage:
#   rebuild_single.sh <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>] [--extra-cflags <flags>]
#
# Examples:
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias.c
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias.c \
#     --config /path/to/config.toml \
#     --extra-cflags "-DENA_AGENT_OPT_CONV_HWC_S8_S8_S8_RGB_SFT_BIAS"
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - libnn.a must already exist (run build_libnn.sh first for initial build)
#   - lib_objs/ directory must exist from prior build
################################################################################
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="${LIBNN_ROOT:-/home/nick/work/agentic_libnn_opt}"

# Parse arguments
SRC_FILE=""
CONFIG_TOML=""
EXTRA_CFLAGS=""

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --config)       CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --extra-cflags) EXTRA_CFLAGS="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)             echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)              SRC_FILE="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>] [--extra-cflags <flags>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Resolve to absolute path if relative
if [[ "${SRC_FILE}" != /* ]]; then
    SRC_FILE="${LIB_ROOT}/${SRC_FILE}"
fi

if [ ! -f "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Source file not found: ${SRC_FILE}" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config if provided, else use hardcoded defaults
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"

if [ -n "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
    TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN:-${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}}"
fi

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"

CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
AR="riscv64-elf-ar"
RANLIB="riscv64-elf-ranlib"
OBJDUMP="riscv64-elf-objdump"

OBJ_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/lib_objs"
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"

# Verify prerequisites
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [ ! -d "${OBJ_DIR}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: lib_objs/ not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# AX45MPV build flags (must match build.sh ax45mpv config)
CFLAGS="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${LIB_ROOT}/internal -c"
CFLAGS+=" -Wall -Werror -O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -fno-strict-aliasing"
CFLAGS+=" -mext-vector -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024"
CFLAGS+=" -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
CFLAGS+=" -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize"

# Detect zfh support
if ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null; then
    ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | grep -q '__riscv_float_abi_single\|__riscv_float_abi_double' && CFLAGS+=" -mzfh"
fi

# Append extra CFLAGS if provided
if [ -n "${EXTRA_CFLAGS}" ]; then
    CFLAGS+=" ${EXTRA_CFLAGS}"
fi

# Object file name (strip path, change .c to .o)
OBJ_NAME="$(basename "${SRC_FILE}" .c).o"
OBJ_FILE="${OBJ_DIR}/${OBJ_NAME}"

# Step 1: Recompile single file
echo "[rebuild] ${SRC_FILE##*/}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o "${OBJ_FILE}" "${SRC_FILE}"

# Step 2: Replace object in archive
echo "[archive] updating ${OBJ_NAME} in libnn.a"
${AR} rD "${LIBNN}" "${OBJ_FILE}"
${RANLIB} -D "${LIBNN}"

# Step 3: Regenerate objdump
echo "[objdump] libnn.objdump"
${OBJDUMP} -S "${LIBNN}" > "${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.objdump"

echo "[done] Rebuilt ${OBJ_NAME} in $(date +%Ts)"

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	################################################################################
3	# Build and run a single libnn unit test on Andes QEMU (AX45MPV)
4	#
5	# Usage:
6	#   run_qemu_test.sh <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N]
7	#
8	# Examples:
9	#   run_qemu_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_asym_bias_any --strace --vlen 1024
10	#   run_qemu_test.sh relu_s8 --strace --vlen 512
11	#
12	# Notes:
13	#   - In Claude Code's sandbox, QEMU semihosting output goes to fd 9, not
14	#     stdout. The --strace flag uses strace to capture fd 9 writes and parse
15	#     "accuracy checking pass/fail".
16	#   - QEMU must be run from Examples/unit_func/ because test binaries open
17	#     golden data via relative paths (e.g., "bin/8b_in1.bin").
18	################################################################################
19	set -uo pipefail
20	
21	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
22	LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"
23	
24	# Defaults
25	USE_STRACE=0
26	VLEN=1024
27	TIMEOUT=120
28	TEST_NAME=""
29	
30	# Parse arguments
31	while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
32	    case "$1" in
33	        --strace)  USE_STRACE=1; shift ;;
34	        --vlen)    VLEN="$2"; shift 2 ;;
35	        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
36	        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
37	        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
38	    esac
39	done
40	
41	if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
42	    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N]" >&2
43	    exit 1
44	fi
45	
46	# Paths
47	TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
48	QEMU_BIN="/local/nick/qemu_andes/build/qemu-system-riscv64"
49	QEMU_CFG="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv/qemu_cfg/zve64d/ADP-AE350-AX45MPV-1C_dw0_mw1.cfg"
50	UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
51	TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
52	WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
53	
54	# Validate
55	for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${QEMU_BIN}" "${QEMU_CFG}" "${TEST_SRC}"; do
56	    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
57	        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
58	        exit 1
59	    fi
60	done
61	
62	export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"
63	mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"
64	
65	# Check libnn.a exists
66	LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
67	if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
68	    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
69	    exit 1
70	fi
71	
72	# Compile
73	CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
74	CFLAGS="-O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections"
75	CFLAGS+=" -mvh -mzfh -DENA_FS_VS"
76	CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000"
77	CFLAGS+=" -DENA_FAST_ALGO -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=0"
78	CFLAGS+=" -DGETENV_TESTDIR=${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"
79	INC="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include"
80	ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.adx"
81	
82	echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME}"
83	${CC} ${CFLAGS} ${INC} -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1
84	if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
85	    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
86	    exit 1
87	fi
88	
89	# Run QEMU
90	# Must run from unit_func dir so semihosting relative file opens work
91	cd "${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"
92	
93	QEMU_CMD="${QEMU_BIN} -readconfig ${QEMU_CFG} -M andes_ae350 -cpu andes-ax45mpv,vext_spec=v1.0,vlen=${VLEN} -nographic -semihosting -bios ${ADX}"
94	
95	echo "[run] QEMU VLEN=${VLEN} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
96	
97	if [ "${USE_STRACE}" -eq 1 ]; then
98	    # Use strace to capture semihosting writes on fd 9
99	    STRACE_LOG="${WORK_DIR}/strace_${TEST_NAME}.log"
100	    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" strace -f -e trace=write -o "${STRACE_LOG}" ${QEMU_CMD} > /dev/null 2>&1
101	    QEMU_RC=$?
102	
103	    # Parse strace output for semihosting messages (fd 9 or fd 1)
104	    # The fd used by QEMU semihosting can vary across environments
105	    OUTPUT=$(grep -E 'write\((9|1),' "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*write([0-9]*, "//; s/\\n".*//; s/".*//') || true
106	
107	    echo ""
108	    echo "--- semihosting output ---"
109	    echo "${OUTPUT}"
110	    echo "--- end ---"
111	    echo ""
112	
113	    # Check for pass/fail
114	    if echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -qi "accuracy checking pass"; then
115	        PASS_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" || true)
116	        FAIL_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" || true)
117	
118	        if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
119	            echo "RESULT: FAIL (${FAIL_COUNT} failures detected)"
120	            exit 1
121	        else
122	            echo "RESULT: PASS (${PASS_COUNT} sub-tests passed)"
123	            exit 0
124	        fi
125	    elif [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
126	        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
127	        exit 1
128	    else
129	        echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected, QEMU exit=${QEMU_RC})"
130	        # Dump last 20 lines of strace for debugging
131	        echo "--- strace tail ---"
132	        tail -20 "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null || true
133	        echo "---"
134	        exit 1
135	    fi
136	else
137	    # Direct run (output may not appear due to fd 9 issue)
138	    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" ${QEMU_CMD} 2>&1
139	    QEMU_RC=$?
140	    if [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
141	        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
142	        exit 1
143	    fi
144	    exit ${QEMU_RC}
145	fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on Andes QEMU (AX45MPV)
#
# Usage:
#   run_qemu_test.sh <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N]
#
# Examples:
#   run_qemu_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_asym_bias_any --strace --vlen 1024
#   run_qemu_test.sh relu_s8 --strace --vlen 512
#
# Notes:
#   - In Claude Code's sandbox, QEMU semihosting output goes to fd 9, not
#     stdout. The --strace flag uses strace to capture fd 9 writes and parse
#     "accuracy checking pass/fail".
#   - QEMU must be run from Examples/unit_func/ because test binaries open
#     golden data via relative paths (e.g., "bin/8b_in1.bin").
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Defaults
USE_STRACE=0
VLEN=1024
TIMEOUT=120
TEST_NAME=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --strace)  USE_STRACE=1; shift ;;
        --vlen)    VLEN="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Paths
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
QEMU_BIN="/local/nick/qemu_andes/build/qemu-system-riscv64"
QEMU_CFG="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv/qemu_cfg/zve64d/ADP-AE350-AX45MPV-1C_dw0_mw1.cfg"
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${QEMU_BIN}" "${QEMU_CFG}" "${TEST_SRC}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
CFLAGS="-O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mvh -mzfh -DENA_FS_VS"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000"
CFLAGS+=" -DENA_FAST_ALGO -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=0"
CFLAGS+=" -DGETENV_TESTDIR=${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"
INC="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.adx"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} ${INC} -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Run QEMU
# Must run from unit_func dir so semihosting relative file opens work
cd "${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"

QEMU_CMD="${QEMU_BIN} -readconfig ${QEMU_CFG} -M andes_ae350 -cpu andes-ax45mpv,vext_spec=v1.0,vlen=${VLEN} -nographic -semihosting -bios ${ADX}"

echo "[run] QEMU VLEN=${VLEN} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"

if [ "${USE_STRACE}" -eq 1 ]; then
    # Use strace to capture semihosting writes on fd 9
    STRACE_LOG="${WORK_DIR}/strace_${TEST_NAME}.log"
    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" strace -f -e trace=write -o "${STRACE_LOG}" ${QEMU_CMD} > /dev/null 2>&1
    QEMU_RC=$?

    # Parse strace output for semihosting messages (fd 9 or fd 1)
    # The fd used by QEMU semihosting can vary across environments
    OUTPUT=$(grep -E 'write\((9|1),' "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*write([0-9]*, "//; s/\\n".*//; s/".*//') || true

    echo ""
    echo "--- semihosting output ---"
    echo "${OUTPUT}"
    echo "--- end ---"
    echo ""

    # Check for pass/fail
    if echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -qi "accuracy checking pass"; then
        PASS_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" || true)
        FAIL_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" || true)

        if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "RESULT: FAIL (${FAIL_COUNT} failures detected)"
            exit 1
        else
            echo "RESULT: PASS (${PASS_COUNT} sub-tests passed)"
            exit 0
        fi
    elif [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected, QEMU exit=${QEMU_RC})"
        # Dump last 20 lines of strace for debugging
        echo "--- strace tail ---"
        tail -20 "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null || true
        echo "---"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    # Direct run (output may not appear due to fd 9 issue)
    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" ${QEMU_CMD} 2>&1
    QEMU_RC=$?
    if [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
        exit 1
    fi
    exit ${QEMU_RC}
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on AX45MPV FPGA board via GDB
# Captures cycle counts from PF_COUNTER output.
#
# Usage:
#   run_fpga_test.sh <test_name> [--timeout N]
#
# Examples:
#   run_fpga_test.sh conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any
#   run_fpga_test.sh relu_s8 --timeout 600
#
# Environment:
#   MYPC   — FPGA board host (default: sw-boards.andestech.com)
#   MYPORT — FPGA board port (default: 1116)
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Defaults
TIMEOUT=300
TEST_NAME=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--timeout N]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Paths
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
BOARD_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv"
WRAPPER="${BOARD_DIR}/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board"

# FPGA board connection
export MYPC="${MYPC:-sw-boards.andestech.com}"
export MYPORT="${MYPORT:-1116}"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${TEST_SRC}" "${WRAPPER}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${LIB_ROOT}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile with performance counters
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.adx"
OBJDUMP_FILE="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.objdump"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME} (with PF_COUNTER)"
${CC} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections \
    -DPF_COUNTER -mvh -DENA_FS_VS -DENA_FAST_ALGO \
    -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 \
    -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mzfh \
    -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS \
    -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=1 \
    -DGETENV_TESTDIR="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}" \
    -I"${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/../riscv64-elf/include" \
    -I"${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include" \
    -I"${LIB_ROOT}/Include" \
    -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Generate objdump for vsim analysis later
riscv64-elf-objdump -d "${ADX}" > "${OBJDUMP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

# Reset board state
rm -f "${BOARD_DIR}/First_Reset_done"

# Run on FPGA via GDB expect script
echo "[run] FPGA board ${MYPC}:${MYPORT} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
LOG="${WORK_DIR}/fpga_${TEST_NAME}.log"

timeout "${TIMEOUT}" "${WRAPPER}" "${ADX}" 2>&1 | tee "${LOG}"
FPGA_RC=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

echo ""

if [ "${FPGA_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
    exit 1
fi

# Parse cycle counts
CYCLE_COUNT=$(grep -o "The cycle count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")
INST_COUNT=$(grep -o "The inst count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")

# Parse accuracy
if grep -qi "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}"; then
    PASS_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}" || true)
    FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" "${LOG}" || true)

    echo "--- FPGA Results ---"
    echo "  Cycles: ${CYCLE_COUNT:-unknown}"
    echo "  Instructions: ${INST_COUNT:-unknown}"
    if [ -n "${CYCLE_COUNT}" ] && [ -n "${INST_COUNT}" ]; then
        IPC=$(python3 -c "print(f'{${INST_COUNT}/${CYCLE_COUNT}:.2f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
        echo "  IPC: ${IPC}"
    fi
    echo "  Accuracy: ${PASS_COUNT} pass, ${FAIL_COUNT} fail"
    echo "  ADX: ${ADX}"
    echo "  Objdump: ${OBJDUMP_FILE}"
    echo "---"

    if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: FAIL"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: PASS (cycles=${CYCLE_COUNT})"
        exit 0
    fi
else
    echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected)"
    exit 1
fi

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	################################################################################
3	# Incrementally rebuild a single source file and update libnn.a
4	# ~100x faster than full build.sh (1 file vs ~400 files)
5	#
6	# Usage:
7	#   rebuild_single.sh <source_file.c>
8	#
9	# Examples:
10	#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any.c
11	#   rebuild_single.sh Source/PoolingFunctions/riscv_nn_maxpool_HWC_s8.c
12	#
13	# Prerequisites:
14	#   - libnn.a must already exist (run build_libnn.sh first for initial build)
15	#   - lib_objs/ directory must exist from prior build
16	################################################################################
17	set -euo pipefail
18	
19	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
20	LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"
21	
22	if [ $# -lt 1 ]; then
23	    echo "Usage: $0 <source_file.c>" >&2
24	    echo "  e.g.: $0 Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any.c" >&2
25	    exit 1
26	fi
27	
28	SRC_FILE="$1"
29	
30	# Resolve to absolute path if relative
31	if [[ "${SRC_FILE}" != /* ]]; then
32	    SRC_FILE="${LIB_ROOT}/${SRC_FILE}"
33	fi
34	
35	if [ ! -f "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
36	    echo "ERROR: Source file not found: ${SRC_FILE}" >&2
37	    exit 1
38	fi
39	
40	# Paths
41	TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
42	export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"
43	
44	CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
45	AR="riscv64-elf-ar"
46	RANLIB="riscv64-elf-ranlib"
47	OBJDUMP="riscv64-elf-objdump"
48	
49	OBJ_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/lib_objs"
50	LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
51	
52	# Verify prerequisites
53	if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
54	    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
55	    exit 1
56	fi
57	if [ ! -d "${OBJ_DIR}" ]; then
58	    echo "ERROR: lib_objs/ not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
59	    exit 1
60	fi
61	
62	# AX45MPV build flags (must match build.sh ax45mpv config)
63	CFLAGS="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${LIB_ROOT}/internal -c"
64	CFLAGS+=" -Wall -Werror -O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections"
65	CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -fno-strict-aliasing"
66	CFLAGS+=" -mext-vector -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024"
67	CFLAGS+=" -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
68	CFLAGS+=" -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize"
69	
70	# Detect zfh support
71	if ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null; then

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Incrementally rebuild a single source file and update libnn.a
# ~100x faster than full build.sh (1 file vs ~400 files)
#
# Usage:
#   rebuild_single.sh <source_file.c>
#
# Examples:
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any.c
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/PoolingFunctions/riscv_nn_maxpool_HWC_s8.c
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - libnn.a must already exist (run build_libnn.sh first for initial build)
#   - lib_objs/ directory must exist from prior build
################################################################################
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

if [ $# -lt 1 ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <source_file.c>" >&2
    echo "  e.g.: $0 Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any.c" >&2
    exit 1
fi

SRC_FILE="$1"

# Resolve to absolute path if relative
if [[ "${SRC_FILE}" != /* ]]; then
    SRC_FILE="${LIB_ROOT}/${SRC_FILE}"
fi

if [ ! -f "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Source file not found: ${SRC_FILE}" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Paths
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"

CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
AR="riscv64-elf-ar"
RANLIB="riscv64-elf-ranlib"
OBJDUMP="riscv64-elf-objdump"

OBJ_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/lib_objs"
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"

# Verify prerequisites
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [ ! -d "${OBJ_DIR}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: lib_objs/ not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# AX45MPV build flags (must match build.sh ax45mpv config)
CFLAGS="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${LIB_ROOT}/internal -c"
CFLAGS+=" -Wall -Werror -O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -fno-strict-aliasing"
CFLAGS+=" -mext-vector -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024"
CFLAGS+=" -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
CFLAGS+=" -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize"

# Detect zfh support
if ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null; then
    ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | grep -q '__riscv_float_abi_single\|__riscv_float_abi_double' && CFLAGS+=" -mzfh"
fi

# Object file name (strip path, change .c to .o)
OBJ_NAME="$(basename "${SRC_FILE}" .c).o"
OBJ_FILE="${OBJ_DIR}/${OBJ_NAME}"

# Step 1: Recompile single file
echo "[rebuild] ${SRC_FILE##*/}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o "${OBJ_FILE}" "${SRC_FILE}"

# Step 2: Replace object in archive
echo "[archive] updating ${OBJ_NAME} in libnn.a"
${AR} rD "${LIBNN}" "${OBJ_FILE}"
${RANLIB} -D "${LIBNN}"

# Step 3: Regenerate objdump
echo "[objdump] libnn.objdump"
${OBJDUMP} -S "${LIBNN}" > "${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.objdump"

echo "[done] Rebuilt ${OBJ_NAME} in $(date +%Ts)"

# Step 2: Toolchain - bin_dir exists, gcc exists, Andes flags work
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def step_toolchain(cfg):
    header("Step 2: Toolchain")

    bin_dir = cfg["toolchain"]["bin_dir"]
    prefix = cfg["toolchain"]["prefix"]

    if not os.path.isdir(bin_dir):
        fail(f"bin_dir does not exist: {bin_dir}")
        # Suggest alternatives
        for candidate in [
            "/local/nick/build-ast540/bin",
            "/local/nick/build-system-3/toolchain/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin",
        ]:
            gcc = os.path.join(candidate, f"{prefix}gcc")
            if os.path.isfile(gcc):
                warn(f"Found alternative: {candidate}")
        die("Fix [toolchain].bin_dir in config.toml and rerun.")

    ok(f"bin_dir exists: {bin_dir}")

    gcc = os.path.join(bin_dir, f"{prefix}gcc")
    if not os.path.isfile(gcc):
        die(f"gcc not found: {gcc}")

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on AX45MPV FPGA board via GDB
# Captures cycle counts from PF_COUNTER output.
#
# Usage:
#   run_fpga_test.sh <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   run_fpga_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias --config /path/to/config.toml
#   run_fpga_test.sh relu_s8 --timeout 600
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="${LIBNN_ROOT:-/home/nick/work/agentic_libnn_opt}"

# Defaults
TIMEOUT=300
TEST_NAME=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --config)  CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config if provided, else use hardcoded defaults
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
FPGA_HOST="sw-boards.andestech.com"
FPGA_PORT="1115"

if [ -n "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
    TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN:-${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}}"
    FPGA_HOST="${CFG_FPGA_HOST:-${FPGA_HOST}}"
    FPGA_PORT="${CFG_FPGA_PORT:-${FPGA_PORT}}"
    TIMEOUT="${CFG_FPGA_TIMEOUT:-${TIMEOUT}}"
fi

# Paths
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
BOARD_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv"
WRAPPER="${BOARD_DIR}/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board"

# FPGA board connection (env vars override config, config overrides defaults)
export MYPC="${MYPC:-${FPGA_HOST}}"
export MYPORT="${MYPORT:-${FPGA_PORT}}"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${TEST_SRC}" "${WRAPPER}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

# Create gdb-nopython symlink if needed (GDB expect script requires it)
GDB_REAL="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb"
GDB_NOPYTHON="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
GDB_EXTRA_PATH=""
if [ -f "${GDB_REAL}" ] && [ ! -e "${GDB_NOPYTHON}" ]; then
    GDB_TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/fpga_gdb_XXXXXX)
    ln -sf "${GDB_REAL}" "${GDB_TMPDIR}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
    GDB_EXTRA_PATH="${GDB_TMPDIR}:"
fi

export PATH="${GDB_EXTRA_PATH}${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${LIB_ROOT}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile with performance counters
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.adx"
OBJDUMP_FILE="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.objdump"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME} (with PF_COUNTER)"
${CC} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections \
    -DPF_COUNTER -mvh -DENA_FS_VS -DENA_FAST_ALGO \
    -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 \
    -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mzfh \
    -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS \
    -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=1 \
    -DGETENV_TESTDIR="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}" \
    -I"${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/../riscv64-elf/include" \
    -I"${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include" \
    -I"${LIB_ROOT}/Include" \
    -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Generate objdump for analysis
riscv64-elf-objdump -d "${ADX}" > "${OBJDUMP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

# Reset board state
rm -f "${BOARD_DIR}/First_Reset_done"

# Run on FPGA via GDB expect script
echo "[run] FPGA board ${MYPC}:${MYPORT} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
LOG="${WORK_DIR}/fpga_${TEST_NAME}.log"

timeout "${TIMEOUT}" "${WRAPPER}" "${ADX}" 2>&1 | tee "${LOG}"
FPGA_RC=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

echo ""

if [ "${FPGA_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
    exit 1
fi

# Parse cycle counts
CYCLE_COUNT=$(grep -o "The cycle count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")
INST_COUNT=$(grep -o "The inst count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")

# Parse accuracy
if grep -qi "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}"; then
    PASS_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}" || true)
    FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" "${LOG}" || true)

    echo "--- FPGA Results ---"
    echo "  Cycles: ${CYCLE_COUNT:-unknown}"
    echo "  Instructions: ${INST_COUNT:-unknown}"
    if [ -n "${CYCLE_COUNT}" ] && [ -n "${INST_COUNT}" ]; then
        IPC=$(python3 -c "print(f'{${INST_COUNT}/${CYCLE_COUNT}:.2f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
        echo "  IPC: ${IPC}"
    fi
    echo "  Accuracy: ${PASS_COUNT} pass, ${FAIL_COUNT} fail"
    echo "  ADX: ${ADX}"
    echo "  Objdump: ${OBJDUMP_FILE}"
    echo "---"

    if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: FAIL"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: PASS (cycles=${CYCLE_COUNT})"
        exit 0
    fi
else
    echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected)"
    exit 1
fi

#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias.c \
#     --config /path/to/config.toml \
#     --extra-cflags "-DENA_AGENT_OPT_CONV_HWC_S8_S8_S8_RGB_SFT_BIAS"

#   - lib_objs/ directory must exist from prior build

        --config)       CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;

        -*)             echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;

    esac
done

if [ -z "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>] [--extra-cflags <flags>]" >&2

RANLIB="riscv64-elf-ranlib"

CFLAGS+=" -Wall -Werror -O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -fno-strict-aliasing"
CFLAGS+=" -mext-vector -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024"
CFLAGS+=" -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
CFLAGS+=" -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize"

# Detect zfh support
if ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null; then
    ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | grep -q '__riscv_float_abi_single\|__riscv_float_abi_double' && CFLAGS+=" -mzfh"
fi

# Append extra CFLAGS if provided
if [ -n "${EXTRA_CFLAGS}" ]; then
    CFLAGS+=" ${EXTRA_CFLAGS}"
fi

# Object file name (strip path, change .c to .o)
OBJ_NAME="$(basename "${SRC_FILE}" .c).o"
OBJ_FILE="${OBJ_DIR}/${OBJ_NAME}"

# Step 1: Recompile single file
echo "[rebuild] ${SRC_FILE##*/}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o "${OBJ_FILE}" "${SRC_FILE}"

# Step 2: Replace object in archive
echo "[archive] updating ${OBJ_NAME} in libnn.a"
${AR} rD "${LIBNN}" "${OBJ_FILE}"
${RANLIB} -D "${LIBNN}"

# Step 3: Regenerate objdump
echo "[objdump] libnn.objdump"
${OBJDUMP} -S "${LIBNN}" > "${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.objdump"

echo "[done] Rebuilt ${OBJ_NAME} in $(date +%Ts)"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on Andes QEMU (AX45MPV)
#
# Usage:
#   run_qemu_test.sh <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   run_qemu_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias --strace --config /path/to/config.toml
#   run_qemu_test.sh relu_s8 --strace --vlen 512
#
# Notes:
#   - In Claude Code's sandbox, QEMU semihosting output goes to fd 9, not
#     stdout. The --strace flag uses strace to capture fd 9 writes and parse
#     "accuracy checking pass/fail".
#   - QEMU must be run from Examples/unit_func/ because test binaries open
#     golden data via relative paths (e.g., "bin/8b_in1.bin").
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="${LIBNN_ROOT:-/home/nick/work/agentic_libnn_opt}"

# Defaults
USE_STRACE=0
VLEN=1024
TIMEOUT=120
TEST_NAME=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --strace)  USE_STRACE=1; shift ;;
        --vlen)    VLEN="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --config)  CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config if provided, else use hardcoded defaults
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
QEMU_BIN_PATH="/local/nick/qemu_v5/build/qemu-system-riscv64"

if [ -n "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
    TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN:-${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}}"
    QEMU_BIN_PATH="${CFG_QEMU_BIN:-${QEMU_BIN_PATH}}"
    VLEN="${CFG_QEMU_VLEN:-${VLEN}}"
    TIMEOUT="${CFG_QEMU_TIMEOUT:-${TIMEOUT}}"
fi

QEMU_BIN="${QEMU_BIN_PATH}"
QEMU_CFG="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv/qemu_cfg/zve64d/ADP-AE350-AX45MPV-1C_dw0_mw1.cfg"
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${QEMU_BIN}" "${QEMU_CFG}" "${TEST_SRC}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
CFLAGS="-O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mvh -mzfh -DENA_FS_VS"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000"
CFLAGS+=" -DENA_FAST_ALGO -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=0"
CFLAGS+=" -DGETENV_TESTDIR=${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"
INC="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.adx"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} ${INC} -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Run QEMU
# Must run from unit_func dir so semihosting relative file opens work
cd "${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"

QEMU_CMD="${QEMU_BIN} -readconfig ${QEMU_CFG} -M andes_ae350 -cpu andes-ax45mpv,vext_spec=v1.0,vlen=${VLEN} -nographic -semihosting -bios ${ADX}"

echo "[run] QEMU VLEN=${VLEN} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"

if [ "${USE_STRACE}" -eq 1 ]; then
    # Use strace to capture semihosting writes on fd 9
    STRACE_LOG="${WORK_DIR}/strace_${TEST_NAME}.log"
    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" strace -f -e trace=write -o "${STRACE_LOG}" ${QEMU_CMD} > /dev/null 2>&1
    QEMU_RC=$?

    # Parse strace output for semihosting messages (fd 9 or fd 1)
    OUTPUT=$(grep -E 'write\((9|1),' "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*write([0-9]*, "//; s/\\n".*//; s/".*//') || true

    echo ""
    echo "--- semihosting output ---"
    echo "${OUTPUT}"
    echo "--- end ---"
    echo ""

    # Check for pass/fail
    if echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -qi "accuracy checking pass"; then
        PASS_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" || true)
        FAIL_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" || true)

        if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "RESULT: FAIL (${FAIL_COUNT} failures detected)"
            exit 1
        else
            echo "RESULT: PASS (${PASS_COUNT} sub-tests passed)"
            exit 0
        fi
    elif [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected, QEMU exit=${QEMU_RC})"
        echo "--- strace tail ---"
        tail -20 "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null || true
        echo "---"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    # Direct run (output may not appear due to fd 9 issue)
    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" ${QEMU_CMD} 2>&1
    QEMU_RC=$?
    if [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
        exit 1
    fi
    exit ${QEMU_RC}
fi

#
# Notes:
#   - In Claude Code's sandbox, QEMU semihosting output goes to fd 9, not
#     stdout. The --strace flag uses strace to capture fd 9 writes and parse
#     "accuracy checking pass/fail".
#   - QEMU must be run from Examples/unit_func/ because test binaries open
#     golden data via relative paths (e.g., "bin/8b_in1.bin").
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Defaults
USE_STRACE=0
VLEN=1024
TIMEOUT=120
TEST_NAME=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --strace)  USE_STRACE=1; shift ;;
        --vlen)    VLEN="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--strace] [--vlen N] [--timeout N]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Paths
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin"
QEMU_BIN="/local/nick/qemu_andes/build/qemu-system-riscv64"
QEMU_CFG="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv/qemu_cfg/zve64d/ADP-AE350-AX45MPV-1C_dw0_mw1.cfg"
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${QEMU_BIN}" "${QEMU_CFG}" "${TEST_SRC}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
CFLAGS="-O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mvh -mzfh -DENA_FS_VS"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000"
CFLAGS+=" -DENA_FAST_ALGO -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=0"
CFLAGS+=" -DGETENV_TESTDIR=${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"
INC="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.adx"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} ${INC} -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Run QEMU
# Must run from unit_func dir so semihosting relative file opens work
cd "${UNIT_TEST_DIR}"

QEMU_CMD="${QEMU_BIN} -readconfig ${QEMU_CFG} -M andes_ae350 -cpu andes-ax45mpv,vext_spec=v1.0,vlen=${VLEN} -nographic -semihosting -bios ${ADX}"

echo "[run] QEMU VLEN=${VLEN} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"

if [ "${USE_STRACE}" -eq 1 ]; then
    # Use strace to capture semihosting writes on fd 9
    STRACE_LOG="${WORK_DIR}/strace_${TEST_NAME}.log"
    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" strace -f -e trace=write -o "${STRACE_LOG}" ${QEMU_CMD} > /dev/null 2>&1
    QEMU_RC=$?

    # Parse strace output for semihosting messages (fd 9 or fd 1)
    # The fd used by QEMU semihosting can vary across environments
    OUTPUT=$(grep -E 'write\((9|1),' "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*write([0-9]*, "//; s/\\n".*//; s/".*//') || true

    echo ""
    echo "--- semihosting output ---"
    echo "${OUTPUT}"
    echo "--- end ---"
    echo ""

    # Check for pass/fail
    if echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -qi "accuracy checking pass"; then
        PASS_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" || true)
        FAIL_COUNT=$(echo "${OUTPUT}" | grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" || true)

        if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "RESULT: FAIL (${FAIL_COUNT} failures detected)"
            exit 1
        else
            echo "RESULT: PASS (${PASS_COUNT} sub-tests passed)"
            exit 0
        fi
    elif [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected, QEMU exit=${QEMU_RC})"
        # Dump last 20 lines of strace for debugging
        echo "--- strace tail ---"
        tail -20 "${STRACE_LOG}" 2>/dev/null || true
        echo "---"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    # Direct run (output may not appear due to fd 9 issue)
    timeout "${TIMEOUT}" ${QEMU_CMD} 2>&1
    QEMU_RC=$?
    if [ "${QEMU_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
        exit 1
    fi
    exit ${QEMU_RC}
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on AX45MPV FPGA board via GDB
# Captures cycle counts from PF_COUNTER output.
#
# Usage:
#   run_fpga_test.sh <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   run_fpga_test.sh conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any --config opt/config.toml
#   run_fpga_test.sh relu_s8 --timeout 600
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Defaults
TIMEOUT=300
TEST_NAME=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --config)  CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config (required)
if [ -z "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    CONFIG_TOML="${LIB_ROOT}/opt/config.toml"
fi
if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: config.toml not found: ${CONFIG_TOML}" >&2
    echo "  Provide --config <path> or ensure opt/config.toml exists." >&2
    exit 1
fi
source "${LIB_ROOT}/opt/script/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN}"
FPGA_HOST="${CFG_FPGA_HOST}"
FPGA_PORT="${CFG_FPGA_PORT}"
TIMEOUT="${CFG_FPGA_TIMEOUT:-${TIMEOUT}}"

# Paths
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
BOARD_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv"
WRAPPER="${BOARD_DIR}/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board"

# FPGA board connection
export MYPC="${FPGA_HOST}"
export MYPORT="${FPGA_PORT}"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${TEST_SRC}" "${WRAPPER}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

# Create gdb-nopython symlink if needed (GDB expect script requires it)
GDB_REAL="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb"
GDB_NOPYTHON="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
GDB_EXTRA_PATH=""
if [ -f "${GDB_REAL}" ] && [ ! -e "${GDB_NOPYTHON}" ]; then
    GDB_TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/fpga_gdb_XXXXXX)
    ln -sf "${GDB_REAL}" "${GDB_TMPDIR}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
    GDB_EXTRA_PATH="${GDB_TMPDIR}:"
fi

export PATH="${GDB_EXTRA_PATH}${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${LIB_ROOT}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile with performance counters
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.adx"
OBJDUMP_FILE="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.objdump"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME} (with PF_COUNTER)"
${CC} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections \
    -DPF_COUNTER -mvh -DENA_FS_VS -DENA_FAST_ALGO \
    -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 \
    -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mzfh \
    -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS \
    -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=1 \
    -DGETENV_TESTDIR="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}" \
    -I"${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/../riscv64-elf/include" \
    -I"${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include" \
    -I"${LIB_ROOT}/Include" \
    -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Generate objdump for analysis
riscv64-elf-objdump -d "${ADX}" > "${OBJDUMP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

# Reset board state
rm -f "${BOARD_DIR}/First_Reset_done"

# Run on FPGA via GDB expect script
echo "[run] FPGA board ${MYPC}:${MYPORT} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
LOG="${WORK_DIR}/fpga_${TEST_NAME}.log"

timeout "${TIMEOUT}" "${WRAPPER}" "${ADX}" 2>&1 | tee "${LOG}"
FPGA_RC=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

echo ""

if [ "${FPGA_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
    exit 1
fi

# Parse cycle counts
CYCLE_COUNT=$(grep -o "The cycle count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")
INST_COUNT=$(grep -o "The inst count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")

# Parse accuracy
if grep -qi "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}"; then
    PASS_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}" || true)
    FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" "${LOG}" || true)

    echo "--- FPGA Results ---"
    echo "  Cycles: ${CYCLE_COUNT:-unknown}"
    echo "  Instructions: ${INST_COUNT:-unknown}"
    if [ -n "${CYCLE_COUNT}" ] && [ -n "${INST_COUNT}" ]; then
        IPC=$(python3 -c "print(f'{${INST_COUNT}/${CYCLE_COUNT}:.2f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
        echo "  IPC: ${IPC}"
    fi
    echo "  Accuracy: ${PASS_COUNT} pass, ${FAIL_COUNT} fail"
    echo "  ADX: ${ADX}"
    echo "  Objdump: ${OBJDUMP_FILE}"
    echo "---"

    if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: FAIL"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: PASS (cycles=${CYCLE_COUNT})"
        exit 0
    fi
else
    echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected)"
    exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build libnn for AX45MPV with RVV (VLEN=1024)
# Output: libnn.a and libnn.objdump at the repo root
#
# Usage:
#   build_libnn.sh [--config <config.toml>]
################################################################################
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Parse arguments
CONFIG_TOML=""
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --config) CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Incrementally rebuild a single source file and update libnn.a
# ~100x faster than full build.sh (1 file vs ~400 files)
#
# Usage:
#   rebuild_single.sh <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any.c
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/PoolingFunctions/riscv_nn_maxpool_HWC_s8.c --config opt/config.toml
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - libnn.a must already exist (run build_libnn.sh first for initial build)
#   - lib_objs/ directory must exist from prior build
################################################################################
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Parse arguments
SRC_FILE=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --config) CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)       echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)        SRC_FILE="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Resolve to absolute path if relative
if [[ "${SRC_FILE}" != /* ]]; then
    SRC_FILE="${LIB_ROOT}/${SRC_FILE}"
fi

if [ ! -f "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Source file not found: ${SRC_FILE}" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config (required)
if [ -z "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    CONFIG_TOML="${LIB_ROOT}/opt/config.toml"
fi
if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: config.toml not found: ${CONFIG_TOML}" >&2
    echo "  Provide --config <path> or ensure opt/config.toml exists." >&2
    exit 1
fi
source "${LIB_ROOT}/opt/script/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN}"

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"

CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
AR="riscv64-elf-ar"
RANLIB="riscv64-elf-ranlib"
OBJDUMP="riscv64-elf-objdump"

OBJ_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/lib_objs"
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"

# Verify prerequisites
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [ ! -d "${OBJ_DIR}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: lib_objs/ not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# AX45MPV build flags (must match build.sh ax45mpv config)
CFLAGS="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${LIB_ROOT}/internal -c"
CFLAGS+=" -Wall -Werror -O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -fno-strict-aliasing"
CFLAGS+=" -mext-vector -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024"
CFLAGS+=" -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
CFLAGS+=" -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize"

# Detect zfh support
if ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null; then
    ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | grep -q '__riscv_float_abi_single\|__riscv_float_abi_double' && CFLAGS+=" -mzfh"
fi

# Object file name (strip path, change .c to .o)
OBJ_NAME="$(basename "${SRC_FILE}" .c).o"
OBJ_FILE="${OBJ_DIR}/${OBJ_NAME}"

# Step 1: Recompile single file
echo "[rebuild] ${SRC_FILE##*/}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o "${OBJ_FILE}" "${SRC_FILE}"

# Step 2: Replace object in archive
echo "[archive] updating ${OBJ_NAME} in libnn.a"
${AR} rD "${LIBNN}" "${OBJ_FILE}"
${RANLIB} -D "${LIBNN}"

# Step 3: Regenerate objdump
echo "[objdump] libnn.objdump"
${OBJDUMP} -S "${LIBNN}" > "${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.objdump"

echo "[done] Rebuilt ${OBJ_NAME} in $(date +%Ts)"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on AX45MPV FPGA board via GDB
# Captures cycle counts from PF_COUNTER output.
#
# Usage:
#   run_fpga_test.sh <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   run_fpga_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias --config /path/to/config.toml
#   run_fpga_test.sh relu_s8 --timeout 600
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="${LIBNN_ROOT:-/home/nick/work/agentic_libnn_opt}"

# Defaults
TIMEOUT=300
TEST_NAME=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --config)  CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config (required)
if [ -z "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    CONFIG_TOML="${SCRIPT_DIR}/../../opt/config.toml"
fi
if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: config.toml not found: ${CONFIG_TOML}" >&2
    echo "  Provide --config <path> or ensure opt/config.toml exists." >&2
    exit 1
fi
source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN}"
FPGA_HOST="${CFG_FPGA_HOST}"
FPGA_PORT="${CFG_FPGA_PORT}"
TIMEOUT="${CFG_FPGA_TIMEOUT:-${TIMEOUT}}"

# Paths
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
BOARD_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv"
WRAPPER="${BOARD_DIR}/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board"

# FPGA board connection (env vars override config, config overrides defaults)
export MYPC="${MYPC:-${FPGA_HOST}}"
export MYPORT="${MYPORT:-${FPGA_PORT}}"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${TEST_SRC}" "${WRAPPER}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

# Create gdb-nopython symlink if needed (GDB expect script requires it)
GDB_REAL="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb"
GDB_NOPYTHON="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
GDB_EXTRA_PATH=""
if [ -f "${GDB_REAL}" ] && [ ! -e "${GDB_NOPYTHON}" ]; then
    GDB_TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/fpga_gdb_XXXXXX)
    ln -sf "${GDB_REAL}" "${GDB_TMPDIR}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
    GDB_EXTRA_PATH="${GDB_TMPDIR}:"
fi

export PATH="${GDB_EXTRA_PATH}${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${LIB_ROOT}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile with performance counters
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.adx"
OBJDUMP_FILE="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.objdump"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME} (with PF_COUNTER)"
${CC} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections \
    -DPF_COUNTER -mvh -DENA_FS_VS -DENA_FAST_ALGO \
    -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 \
    -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mzfh \
    -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS \
    -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=1 \
    -DGETENV_TESTDIR="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}" \
    -I"${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/../riscv64-elf/include" \
    -I"${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include" \
    -I"${LIB_ROOT}/Include" \
    -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Generate objdump for analysis
riscv64-elf-objdump -d "${ADX}" > "${OBJDUMP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

# Reset board state
rm -f "${BOARD_DIR}/First_Reset_done"

# Run on FPGA via GDB expect script
echo "[run] FPGA board ${MYPC}:${MYPORT} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
LOG="${WORK_DIR}/fpga_${TEST_NAME}.log"

timeout "${TIMEOUT}" "${WRAPPER}" "${ADX}" 2>&1 | tee "${LOG}"
FPGA_RC=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

echo ""

if [ "${FPGA_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
    exit 1
fi

# Parse cycle counts
CYCLE_COUNT=$(grep -o "The cycle count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")
INST_COUNT=$(grep -o "The inst count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")

# Parse accuracy
if grep -qi "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}"; then
    PASS_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}" || true)
    FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" "${LOG}" || true)

    echo "--- FPGA Results ---"
    echo "  Cycles: ${CYCLE_COUNT:-unknown}"
    echo "  Instructions: ${INST_COUNT:-unknown}"
    if [ -n "${CYCLE_COUNT}" ] && [ -n "${INST_COUNT}" ]; then
        IPC=$(python3 -c "print(f'{${INST_COUNT}/${CYCLE_COUNT}:.2f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
        echo "  IPC: ${IPC}"
    fi
    echo "  Accuracy: ${PASS_COUNT} pass, ${FAIL_COUNT} fail"
    echo "  ADX: ${ADX}"
    echo "  Objdump: ${OBJDUMP_FILE}"
    echo "---"

    if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: FAIL"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: PASS (cycles=${CYCLE_COUNT})"
        exit 0
    fi
else
    echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected)"
    exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build and run a single libnn unit test on AX45MPV FPGA board via GDB
# Captures cycle counts from PF_COUNTER output.
#
# Usage:
#   run_fpga_test.sh <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   run_fpga_test.sh conv_HWC_s8_s8_s8_RGB_sft_bias --config /path/to/config.toml
#   run_fpga_test.sh relu_s8 --timeout 600
################################################################################
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="${LIBNN_ROOT:-/home/nick/work/agentic_libnn_opt}"

# Defaults
TIMEOUT=300
TEST_NAME=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --timeout) TIMEOUT="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        --config)  CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)        echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)         TEST_NAME="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${TEST_NAME}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <test_name> [--timeout N] [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config (required)
if [ -z "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    CONFIG_TOML="${SCRIPT_DIR}/../../opt/config.toml"
fi
if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: config.toml not found: ${CONFIG_TOML}" >&2
    echo "  Provide --config <path> or ensure opt/config.toml exists." >&2
    exit 1
fi
source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN}"
FPGA_HOST="${CFG_FPGA_HOST}"
FPGA_PORT="${CFG_FPGA_PORT}"
TIMEOUT="${CFG_FPGA_TIMEOUT:-${TIMEOUT}}"

# Paths
UNIT_TEST_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/Examples/unit_func"
TEST_SRC="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}.c"
WORK_DIR="${SCRIPT_DIR}/work"
BOARD_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv"
WRAPPER="${BOARD_DIR}/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board"

# FPGA board connection (from config.toml)
export MYPC="${FPGA_HOST}"
export MYPORT="${FPGA_PORT}"

# Validate
for f in "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gcc" "${TEST_SRC}" "${WRAPPER}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Not found: $f" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

# Create gdb-nopython symlink if needed (GDB expect script requires it)
GDB_REAL="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb"
GDB_NOPYTHON="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
GDB_EXTRA_PATH=""
if [ -f "${GDB_REAL}" ] && [ ! -e "${GDB_NOPYTHON}" ]; then
    GDB_TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/fpga_gdb_XXXXXX)
    ln -sf "${GDB_REAL}" "${GDB_TMPDIR}/riscv64-elf-gdb-nopython"
    GDB_EXTRA_PATH="${GDB_TMPDIR}:"
fi

export PATH="${GDB_EXTRA_PATH}${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${LIB_ROOT}:${PATH}"
mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"

# Check libnn.a exists
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Compile with performance counters
CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
ADX="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.adx"
OBJDUMP_FILE="${WORK_DIR}/t_${TEST_NAME}_perf.objdump"

echo "[compile] ${TEST_NAME} (with PF_COUNTER)"
${CC} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wl,-gc-sections \
    -DPF_COUNTER -mvh -DENA_FS_VS -DENA_FAST_ALGO \
    -mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=zve64d -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 \
    -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mzfh \
    -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS \
    -DENA_DUMP_GOLDEN=0 -DENA_MEASURE_PERF=1 \
    -DGETENV_TESTDIR="${UNIT_TEST_DIR}" \
    -I"${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}/../riscv64-elf/include" \
    -I"${UNIT_TEST_DIR}/include" \
    -I"${LIB_ROOT}/Include" \
    -o "${ADX}" "${TEST_SRC}" "${LIBNN}" -lm 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: COMPILE_ERROR" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Generate objdump for analysis
riscv64-elf-objdump -d "${ADX}" > "${OBJDUMP_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

# Reset board state
rm -f "${BOARD_DIR}/First_Reset_done"

# Run on FPGA via GDB expect script
echo "[run] FPGA board ${MYPC}:${MYPORT} (timeout=${TIMEOUT}s)"
LOG="${WORK_DIR}/fpga_${TEST_NAME}.log"

timeout "${TIMEOUT}" "${WRAPPER}" "${ADX}" 2>&1 | tee "${LOG}"
FPGA_RC=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

echo ""

if [ "${FPGA_RC}" -eq 124 ]; then
    echo "RESULT: TIMEOUT (${TIMEOUT}s)"
    exit 1
fi

# Parse cycle counts
CYCLE_COUNT=$(grep -o "The cycle count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")
INST_COUNT=$(grep -o "The inst count is [0-9]*" "${LOG}" | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]*" || echo "")

# Parse accuracy
if grep -qi "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}"; then
    PASS_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking pass" "${LOG}" || true)
    FAIL_COUNT=$(grep -ci "accuracy checking fail\|accuracy checking FAIL" "${LOG}" || true)

    echo "--- FPGA Results ---"
    echo "  Cycles: ${CYCLE_COUNT:-unknown}"
    echo "  Instructions: ${INST_COUNT:-unknown}"
    if [ -n "${CYCLE_COUNT}" ] && [ -n "${INST_COUNT}" ]; then
        IPC=$(python3 -c "print(f'{${INST_COUNT}/${CYCLE_COUNT}:.2f}')" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
        echo "  IPC: ${IPC}"
    fi
    echo "  Accuracy: ${PASS_COUNT} pass, ${FAIL_COUNT} fail"
    echo "  ADX: ${ADX}"
    echo "  Objdump: ${OBJDUMP_FILE}"
    echo "---"

    if [ "${FAIL_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "RESULT: FAIL"
        exit 1
    else
        echo "RESULT: PASS (cycles=${CYCLE_COUNT})"
        exit 0
    fi
else
    echo "RESULT: UNKNOWN (no pass/fail detected)"
    exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Incrementally rebuild a single source file and update libnn.a
# ~100x faster than full build.sh (1 file vs ~400 files)
#
# Usage:
#   rebuild_single.sh <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>]
#
# Examples:
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_s8_s8_s8_sym_bias_any.c
#   rebuild_single.sh Source/PoolingFunctions/riscv_nn_maxpool_HWC_s8.c --config opt/config.toml
#
# Prerequisites:
#   - libnn.a must already exist (run build_libnn.sh first for initial build)
#   - lib_objs/ directory must exist from prior build
################################################################################
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Parse arguments
SRC_FILE=""
CONFIG_TOML=""

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --config) CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)       echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)        SRC_FILE="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

if [ -z "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <source_file.c> [--config <config.toml>]" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Resolve to absolute path if relative
if [[ "${SRC_FILE}" != /* ]]; then
    SRC_FILE="${LIB_ROOT}/${SRC_FILE}"
fi

if [ ! -f "${SRC_FILE}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Source file not found: ${SRC_FILE}" >&2
    exit 1
fi

# Load config (required)
if [ -z "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    CONFIG_TOML="${LIB_ROOT}/opt/config.toml"
fi
if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: config.toml not found: ${CONFIG_TOML}" >&2
    echo "  Provide --config <path> or ensure opt/config.toml exists." >&2
    exit 1
fi
source "${LIB_ROOT}/opt/script/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN}"

export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"

CC="riscv64-elf-gcc"
AR="riscv64-elf-ar"
RANLIB="riscv64-elf-ranlib"
OBJDUMP="riscv64-elf-objdump"

OBJ_DIR="${LIB_ROOT}/lib_objs"
LIBNN="${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"

# Verify prerequisites
if [ ! -f "${LIBNN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: libnn.a not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [ ! -d "${OBJ_DIR}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: lib_objs/ not found. Run build_libnn.sh first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

# AX45MPV build flags (must match build.sh ax45mpv config)
CFLAGS="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${LIB_ROOT}/internal -c"
CFLAGS+=" -Wall -Werror -O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections"
CFLAGS+=" -mtune=andes-45-series -fno-strict-aliasing"
CFLAGS+=" -mext-vector -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024"
CFLAGS+=" -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
CFLAGS+=" -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize"

# Detect zfh support
if ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null; then
    ${CC} -mzfh -E -dM ${CFLAGS} - < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | grep -q '__riscv_float_abi_single\|__riscv_float_abi_double' && CFLAGS+=" -mzfh"
fi

# Object file name (strip path, change .c to .o)
OBJ_NAME="$(basename "${SRC_FILE}" .c).o"
OBJ_FILE="${OBJ_DIR}/${OBJ_NAME}"

# Step 1: Recompile single file
echo "[rebuild] ${SRC_FILE##*/}"
${CC} ${CFLAGS} -o "${OBJ_FILE}" "${SRC_FILE}"

# Step 2: Replace object in archive
echo "[archive] updating ${OBJ_NAME} in libnn.a"
${AR} rD "${LIBNN}" "${OBJ_FILE}"
${RANLIB} -D "${LIBNN}"

# Step 3: Regenerate objdump
echo "[objdump] libnn.objdump"
${OBJDUMP} -S "${LIBNN}" > "${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.objdump"

echo "[done] Rebuilt ${OBJ_NAME} in $(date +%Ts)"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Build libnn for AX45MPV with RVV (VLEN=1024)
# Output: libnn.a and libnn.objdump at the repo root
#
# Usage:
#   build_libnn.sh [--config <config.toml>]
################################################################################
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LIB_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"

# Parse arguments
CONFIG_TOML=""
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        --config) CONFIG_TOML="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -*)       echo "Unknown option: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
        *)        echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2; exit 1 ;;
    esac
done

# Load config (required)
if [ -z "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    CONFIG_TOML="${LIB_ROOT}/opt/config.toml"
fi
if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_TOML}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: config.toml not found: ${CONFIG_TOML}" >&2
    echo "  Provide --config <path> or ensure opt/config.toml exists." >&2
    exit 1
fi
source "${LIB_ROOT}/opt/script/parse_config.sh" "${CONFIG_TOML}"
TOOLCHAIN_BIN="${CFG_TOOLCHAIN_BIN}"
CPU="${CFG_CPU:-AX45MPV}"

if [ ! -d "${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Toolchain not found at ${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}" >&2
    exit 1
fi
export PATH="${TOOLCHAIN_BIN}:${PATH}"

echo "Building libnn for ${CPU} (VLEN=1024)..."
cd "${LIB_ROOT}"
/usr/bin/bash build.sh "${CPU}"
ret=$?

if [ $ret -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "Build successful."
    echo "  Library: ${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.a"
    echo "  Objdump: ${LIB_ROOT}/libnn.objdump"
else
    echo "Build FAILED (exit code $ret)" >&2
fi

exit $ret
